TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Looks up W_PARAM_G for the ETL_PROC_WID
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_PARAM_G_Get_ETL_PROC_WID

MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: This mapplet is responsible for getting the correct exchange rates for a date chosen, where a currency conversion to any of the three possible global currencies is involved.
MAPPLET.NAME: MPLT_CURCY_CONVERSION_RATES_ToGlobalCurrenciesOnly

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: For a given "from currency code" and exchange date, this lookup finds the conversion rate to the three possible global currency codes.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_EXCH_RATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EXCH_RATE_G.EXCH_RATE AS EXCH_RATE, W_EXCH_RATE_G.FROM_CURCY_CD AS FROM_CURCY_CD, W_EXCH_RATE_G.TO_CURCY_CD AS TO_CURCY_CD, W_EXCH_RATE_G.START_DT AS START_DT, W_EXCH_RATE_G.END_DT AS END_DT, W_EXCH_RATE_G.RATE_TYPE AS RATE_TYPE, W_EXCH_RATE_G.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AS DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_EXCH_RATE_G, ( SELECT GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE REQUIRED_TO_CURR, GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID DSN FROM W_GLOBAL_CURR_G UNION SELECT GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE REQUIRED_TO_CURR, GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID DSN FROM W_GLOBAL_CURR_G UNION SELECT GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE REQUIRED_TO_CURR, GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID DSN FROM W_GLOBAL_CURR_G ) GLOBAL_CURR WHERE W_EXCH_RATE_G.TO_CURCY_CD = GLOBAL_CURR.REQUIRED_TO_CURR AND W_EXCH_RATE_G.RATE_TYPE = GLOBAL_CURR.REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE AND W_EXCH_RATE_G.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = GLOBAL_CURR.DSN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: FROM_CURCY_CD = IN_FROM_CURCY_CD AND TO_CURCY_CD = IN_TO_CURCY_CD AND START_DT <= IN_EXCH_DT AND END_DT > IN_EXCH_DT AND RATE_TYPE = IN_RATE_TYPE AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE), IIF(LOC_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, IIF(ISNULL(LOC_CURR_CODE), NULL, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE,LOC_CURR_CODE,EXCH_DT,LOC_RATE_TYPE_VAR,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)))), DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE), NULL, IIF(GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, IIF(GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE = LOC_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_GLOBAL1_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE), NULL, IIF(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE = GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_GLOBAL1_EXCH_RATE_VAR, IIF(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, IIF(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE = LOC_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID))))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_GLOBAL2_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE), NULL, IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_GLOBAL1_EXCH_RATE_VAR, IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_GLOBAL2_EXCH_RATE_VAR, IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = LOC_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)))))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_GLOBAL3_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This mapplet is responsible for getting the correct exchange rates for a date chosen, where a currency conversion to any of the three possible global currencies is involved.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: MPLT_CURCY_CONVERSION_RATES_ToGlobalCurrenciesOnly

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: For a given "from currency code" and exchange date, this lookup finds the conversion rate to the three possible global currency codes.
INSTANCE.NAME: LKP_W_EXCH_RATE

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surrogate key to uniquely identify a record.
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: PROJECT_WID

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surrogate key to uniquely identify a record.
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: TASK_WID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Update Strategy Expression
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: IIF(UPDATE_FLG = 'I' OR UPDATE_FLG = 'B' OR UPDATE_FLG = 'S', DD_INSERT, IIF(UPDATE_FLG = 'D' OR UPDATE_FLG = 'U', DD_UPDATE, DD_REJECT))

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surrogate key to uniquely identify a record.
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: PROJECT_WID

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surrogate key to uniquely identify a record.
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: TASK_WID

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surrogate key to uniquely identify a record.
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: PROJECT_WID

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surrogate key to uniquely identify a record.
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: TASK_WID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT FS.ecosys_timephased_budgetid, FS.project_number, FS.project_period, FS.workflow_instance_id, FS.budget_header_id, FS.change_header_id, FS.cost_account_field, FS.path_id, FS.minor_period, FS.jacobs_cost, FS.client_cost, FS.jacobs_hours, FS.client_hours, FS.currency, FS.aux1_changed_on_dt, FS.aux2_changed_on_dt, FS.aux3_changed_on_dt, FS.aux4_changed_on_dt, FS.datasource_num_id, FS.integration_id, FS.tenant_id, NVL(PROJ_D.ROW_WID,0), NVL(MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0), /*case when TO_number(substr(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,-2)) > 21 then 101220211001000 when UPPER(FS.minor_period) in ('OCT-21','NOV-21','DEC-21') then 101220211001000 else nvl(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0) end , */ NVL(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0), NVL(ORG_DH.ROW_WID,0), MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT, NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0), NVL(COBS.ROW_WID,0), FS.GID_EAC_HOURS, NVL(REPLACE(FS.GDCName, ' ', 'Undefined'), 'Undefined') GDCName, FS.GID_CB_FUNC_DIRECTCOST, FS.GID_CB_FUNC_ATBILLREVENUE FROM wc_bi_timephasedata_budget_fs FS, W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D, W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MCAL_D, W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MINOR_MCAL_D, WC_BU_ORG_DH ORG_DH, ( select max(NVL(W_TASK_D.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID FROM W_TASK_D, WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_COBS_D COBS, W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D WHERE COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER AND COBS.ORACLE_TASK_NUMBER = W_TASK_D.TASK_NUMBER AND PROJ_D.INTEGRATION_ID = W_TASK_D.PROJECT_ID AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13 group by COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID)COBS, ( select max(NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID from WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_BDG_HDR_D BUD_WID group by BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID)BUD_WID --,WC_BI_COMPLIANCE_COMPLIANT_A COMP_AGG WHERE FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13 AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.PROJECT_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY') AND MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+) = 1012 AND UPPER(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH' AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY') AND MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+) = 1012 AND UPPER(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH' AND PROJ_D.X_CONTROL_PU = ORG_DH.INTEGRATION_ID (+) AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = ORG_DH.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID (+) AND (NVL(FS.CHANGE_HEADER_ID,FS.BUDGET_HEADER_ID) = (substr(BUD_WID.PROJECt_NUMBER(+),1,6)||'.'||BUD_WID.TASK_ID(+)) ) AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID (+) AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) AND FS.PATH_ID = COBS.PATH_ID (+) AND FS.PROJECT_PERIOD = COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD (+) AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID (+) --AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COMP_AGG.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID --AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = COMP_AGG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID --and FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COMP_AGG.PROJECT_NUMBER

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT FS.ecosys_timephased_budgetid, FS.project_number, FS.project_period, FS.workflow_instance_id, FS.budget_header_id, FS.change_header_id, FS.cost_account_field, FS.path_id, FS.minor_period, FS.jacobs_cost, FS.client_cost, FS.jacobs_hours, FS.client_hours, FS.currency, FS.aux1_changed_on_dt, FS.aux2_changed_on_dt, FS.aux3_changed_on_dt, FS.aux4_changed_on_dt, FS.datasource_num_id, FS.integration_id, FS.tenant_id, NVL(PROJ_D.ROW_WID,0), NVL(MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0), /*case when TO_number(substr(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,-2)) > 21 then 101220211001000 when UPPER(FS.minor_period) in ('OCT-21','NOV-21','DEC-21') then 101220211001000 else nvl(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0) end , */ NVL(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0), NVL(ORG_DH.ROW_WID,0), MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT, NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0), NVL(COBS.ROW_WID,0), FS.GID_EAC_HOURS, NVL(REPLACE(FS.GDCName, ' ', 'Undefined'), 'Undefined') GDCName, FS.GID_CB_FUNC_DIRECTCOST, FS.GID_CB_FUNC_ATBILLREVENUE, FS.GID_Billable_Hours FROM wc_bi_timephasedata_budget_fs FS, W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D, W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MCAL_D, W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MINOR_MCAL_D, WC_BU_ORG_DH ORG_DH, ( select max(NVL(W_TASK_D.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID FROM W_TASK_D, WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_COBS_D COBS, W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D WHERE COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER AND COBS.ORACLE_TASK_NUMBER = W_TASK_D.TASK_NUMBER AND PROJ_D.INTEGRATION_ID = W_TASK_D.PROJECT_ID AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13 group by COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID)COBS, ( select max(NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID from WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_BDG_HDR_D BUD_WID group by BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID)BUD_WID --,WC_BI_COMPLIANCE_COMPLIANT_A COMP_AGG WHERE FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13 AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.PROJECT_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY') AND MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+) = 1012 AND UPPER(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH' AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY') AND MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+) = 1012 AND UPPER(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH' AND PROJ_D.X_CONTROL_PU = ORG_DH.INTEGRATION_ID (+) AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = ORG_DH.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID (+) AND (NVL(FS.CHANGE_HEADER_ID,FS.BUDGET_HEADER_ID) = (substr(BUD_WID.PROJECt_NUMBER(+),1,6)||'.'||BUD_WID.TASK_ID(+)) ) AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID (+) AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) AND FS.PATH_ID = COBS.PATH_ID (+) AND FS.PROJECT_PERIOD = COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD (+) AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID (+) --AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COMP_AGG.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID --AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = COMP_AGG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID --and FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COMP_AGG.PROJECT_NUMBER

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SIL_IPCS_BITimephaseDataBudgetFact.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SIL_IPCS_BITimephaseDataBudgetFact.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SIL_IPCS_BITimephaseDataBudgetFact.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub
